projects.title: Shonk Generator
projects.description:
Generate a Blåhaj in your favorite colors!
You can choose from preset color combinations, pick a different Shonk variant or even use your own!! Once you're done, you can simply download the Shonk as an image or export it into a bash script :3

projects.title: MCSR Stream Finder
projects.description: Find streamers that are currently playing MCSR Ranked (Minecraft Speedrunning) with the help of MCSR's and Twitch's API.

projects.title: Yuko
projects.description: Yuko helps you achieve your goals!

projects.title: Wilber
projects.description:
A free and open source sobriety web app without limits, built with React + Typescript.
It even includes some nice-looking and popular themes!

In case you don't know what it's about: This tracker lets you input addictions you want to quit, this could be anything (biting your fingernails, drugs, alcohol, self-harm etc.). That's why privacy plays such a big role here, this is highly personal data that most people want to keep private!

projects.title: Flavorstats
projects.description: View your, or other peoples Flavortown statistics and generate a pretty card to showcase!
